title: R2B deterministic replay from existing 168 signals selected as positive diagnostic candidate
summary: Prefer R2B as the next GPT35/EE35 repair base over new prompt variants because it improves row recovery without any new live LLM calls.

title: 220_stage5_ee35_deterministic_from_168_current_replay_final_output
summary: R2B lineage 218->219->220 consumed S2-6 run170 and produced 285 S2-7 rows and 233 Stage5 final rows, improving over 184/186 counts of 259 and 212. Audit run221 found 3 improved papers, 0 count regressions, and remaining largest gaps in JRMKHP5C, XDIRIJ74, 2RNHC2M5, YZYKTTFE, and KTNLRQZU. Diagnostic-only; no benchmark claim.

title: primary_np_sample_ids_filtered_as_measurement_only
summary: LLM-authorized partial formulation table rows with HbNPs-style first-column sample IDs were filtered before Stage5.

title: 232_stage5_ee35_r2b_r3_primary_np_id_final_output
summary: Lineage 230->231->232 consumed S2-6 run170 and produced 296 S2-7 rows and 244 Stage5 final rows versus R2B baseline 285 and 233. Audit 233 found JRMKHP5C improved 21->32, one improved paper, and zero paper-level final-row count regressions. Diagnostic-only; identity-level GT alignment remains pending.

title: R2B-R3 primary NP sample-ID guard accepted as positive diagnostic candidate
summary: Treat nanoparticle sample IDs such as HbNPs-5 as primary formulation identity labels so LLM-authorized partial formulation table rows are not filtered as measurement-only non-primary rows.

title: R2B-R4 rowwise sample-ID label canonicalization
summary: Preserve native primary first-cell sample IDs during rowwise formulation materialization instead of replacing them with synthetic row_XX labels.

title: rowwise_sample_id_identity_label_syntheticized
summary: Recovered JRMKHP5C table rows reached Stage5 as row_XX__hbnps-* labels rather than native HbNPs-* sample IDs.

title: 236_stage5_ee35_r2b_r4_rowwise_sample_id_label_final_output
summary: Lineage 234->235->236 consumed S2-6 run170 and preserved aggregate counts at 296 S2-7 rows and 244 Stage5 rows. Audit 237 found 0 paper-level count regressions and improved JRMKHP5C naive missing GT-label count from 24 to 18 by canonicalizing Table 3 labels such as row_01__hbnps-7 to HbNPs7. Diagnostic-only; no benchmark claim.

title: R2B-R5 guarded packed source-row sample-ID recovery
summary: Recover multiple prefixed NP sample IDs from a single authorized source CSV line, but apply cross-table duplicate suppression only to newly augmented packed_prefixed_sample_id_source_row rows.

title: packed_source_row_sample_ids_not_materialized
summary: JRMKHP5C missed many HbNPs-* identities even though the LLM-authorized table source CSV contained packed sample-ID rows.

title: 248_stage5_ee35_r2b_r5_packed_sample_id_guarded_dedup_final_output
summary: Lineage 246->247->248 consumed S2-6 run170 and produced 314 S2-7 rows and 262 Stage5 rows versus R4 296 and 244. Audit 249 found one improved paper, zero paper-level count regressions, JRMKHP5C 32->50, and missing GT labels 18->2; residual +5 over-retention remains, so this is diagnostic-only and not benchmark-valid.
